revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24699703697|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hachiōji Shrine (Morisho Village)
| native_name = 森庄村の八王子社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hachiōji Shrine (Morisho Village)
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hachiōji Shrine (Morisho Village)'''|森庄村の八王子社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database</ref>

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|Q11378973|ltq=Q11378973|qid=Q11378973|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province}}
** Series ordinal: 70
** P155: {{ill|Amatamitsu- Shrine|lt=Amatamitsu- Shrine|qid=Q135039285|1=Amatamitsu- Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135039288|ltq=Q135039288|qid=Q135039288|1=Kishino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q864166|ltq=Q864166|qid=Q864166|1=Ise Province}}
* {{ill|Taki District, Mie|lt=Taki district|ceb|Taki-gun|ckb|گەڕەکی تاکی|en|Taki District, Mie|es|Distrito de Taki|fr|District de Taki|id|Distrik Taki, Mie|it|Distretto di Taki|ja|多気郡|ko|다키군|pl|Powiat Taki (Mie)|uk|Повіт Такі|zh|多氣郡|qid=Q1042360|1=Taki District, Mie}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181177
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== name in kana (P1814) ==

* アフカコタノ-<ref>Engishiki Jinmyōchō</ref>

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Afukakotano- Shrine|lt=Afukakotano- Shrine|qid=Q135039287|1=Afukakotano- Shrine}}
